mode_detection.auto: only wiki/*.md → wiki; any .sh/.json in root/rules/scripts/ → dev_mode

pre_commit_workflow.action: stage with correct command from staging_by_mode
git status --short — verify no untracked/unstaged remain

pre_commit_workflow.note: Runs before git add — ensures wiki/hot.md is fresh so same commit captures both page changes and updated context

post_commit_check.action: if git status shows unstaged files → stage + amend or separate commit

memory_sync_on_dev_commit.note: Atomic update via read→modify→write. Never append.

memory_sync_on_dev_commit.action: wiki/hot.md Active Project: update phase status
memory_sync_on_dev_commit.note: Must run AFTER WM update (reads updated focus_node + recent_activity)
Full procedure for post-task memory sync — read before commit

memory_sync_after_wiki_change.action: wiki/hot.md Recent Changes: summary of wiki edits
